mapper.sql: ModelNo, CustomerNo, MainCustomer, Remark, CreateId, CreateTime, UpdateUser, UpdateTime, is_deleted
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_restrict_customer_whitelist
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_restrict_customer_whitelist (ModelNo, CustomerNo, MainCustomer, Remark, CreateId, CreateTime, UpdateUser, UpdateTime, is_deleted) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{maincustomer,jdbcType=BIT}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{modifyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.product_restrict_customer_whitelist
ModelNo,
CustomerNo,
MainCustomer,
Remark,
CreateId,
CreateTime,
UpdateUser,
UpdateTime,
is_deleted,
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{maincustomer,jdbcType=BIT},
#{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{createid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
#{modifyDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.product_restrict_customer_whitelist
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
MainCustomer = #{record.maincustomer,jdbcType=BIT},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CreateId = #{record.createid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},

update dbo.product_restrict_customer_whitelist set ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, MainCustomer = #{record.maincustomer,jdbcType=BIT}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CreateId = #{record.createid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CreateTime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UpdateUser = #{record.updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}

update dbo.product_restrict_customer_whitelist
MainCustomer = #{maincustomer,jdbcType=BIT},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CreateId = #{createid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CreateTime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UpdateUser = #{updateuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}
